questions.sentence: SEO is not just about keywords and content it also depends heavily on a websites technical performance
Search engines like Google prioritize websites that are fast secure and mobile friendly
As a developer you can improve SEO using technical practices like ServerSide Rendering SSR or Static Site Generation SSG which help search engines crawl and index your content more easily
Additionally using semantic HTML tags such as header main article and footer provides clear meaning to your content
Proper use of Meta Tag's in the HTML head section allowed you to control the title and description that appear in search results
By optimizing these technical aspects you ensure that your website is not only useful for people but also easy for search engines to find
